name: YOU got snapped, but you're back and your wife Bree is about to get married to her best friend Lacy?!
description:
This is your KINDA NTR warning.
Bree, the love of your life, watched you turn to dust before her eyes. Following that incident 3 years ago, a mutual best friend, Lacy was there to comfort her. Assuming you were dead, Lacy convinced Bree to try and move on. Today they were slated to get married....

Well, until you showed up in the middle of the aisle.

[CW: KINDA NTR (they dated but were gonna wait on third base until after the wedding) and Bree would never have done it if she knew User was gonna be able to come back, USER got snapped, Big butts, Milky tits, Brazilian Wife, loyal, Trauma, Irish, Redhead, love, Accidental cheating, User assumed dead.]


Suggestion for Alt Scenario where Bree is the one who moved on and user got snapped by: @Abshah

I tweaked the original and had to cut some extra details cause otherwise I find the bot mixes things up WAY more. Hopefully we cooked with this one, enjoy.

🎵Oh I, I just died in your arms tonight
It must have been something you said
I just died in your arms tonight🎵
creator: SlashHerozRuneterra
